Men in Black: International (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $80,001,807Details
International Box Office $174,308,196
Worldwide Box Office $254,310,003
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,802,146
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,163,798
Total $12,965,944
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Men in Black have always protected the Earth from the scum of the universe. In this new adventure, they tackle their biggest, most global threat to date: a mole in the Men in Black organization.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,035,838 (37.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,224 opening theaters/4,224 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $104,456,511

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 14th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
June 14th, 2019 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: June 12th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
June 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)
June 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Thailand)
June 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Taiwan)
June 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
Video Release: August 20th, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
October 21st, 2019 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action, some language and suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2579 (Cert #52049), 5/22/2019)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Franchise: Men in Black
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Reboot, Standalone Sequel
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: London
Plot point: Alien Encounters, Friendly Alien on Earth, Secret Agent, Secret Identity, Undercover
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Amblin Entertainment, Parkes+Macdonald Productions, Columbia Pictures, Tencent Pictures , Image Nation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
